markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Realign the content strategy with You.com's evolving 2026 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** The strategy now targets two distinct personas: "AI Laggards" (CEOs needing education) and "AI Natives" (developers needing technical depth).](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** GrowthX will focus on top-of-funnel (ToFu) content for AI Laggards to maintain velocity, while You.com handles complex middle-of-funnel (MoFu) content.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [**Technical Content:** To accelerate technical content, GrowthX will repurpose existing white papers into blog posts, bypassing the slow SME review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [**Security:** GrowthX will provide a formal security policy to address concerns about sharing data with competitors (e.g., Tavily) via its research pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)

## Topics

### Challenge: Slow SME Reviews for Technical Content

  - [**Problem:** Technical content requires slow, manual SME reviews, blocking the 5-article/week production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Internal alignment on technical positioning is still forming, making SME feedback broad and delaying approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use competitive articles (e.g., Perplexity, EXA) as a "forcing function" to drive internal alignment on technical capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

### Solution: Dual-Persona Content Strategy

  - [**New Direction:** You.com is now an "AI Search" company, building search for LLMs and agents.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [**Audience Bifurcation:** The strategy targets two distinct personas:](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [**AI Laggards (CEOs):** Need education on AI's business value and operational use cases. Content must be simple and high-level.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [**AI Natives (Developers):** Need technical depth to evaluate the platform. Content must be detailed to earn a spot on their shortlists.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [**Go-to-Market:** A "bottom-up" (DevRel) and "top-down" (CTO/CPO) approach aims to meet in the middle.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

### Solution: Repurposing White Papers for Technical Content

  - [**Idea:** Accelerate technical content by repurposing existing white papers into blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This bypasses the SME review bottleneck, as the source material is already approved and published.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will analyze existing white papers to propose a list of blog post topics, validated by keyword data and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)

### Logistics & Reporting

  - [**Scope:** The engagement is for 5 editorial articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [**Reporting:** Bi-weekly performance snapshots and a monthly deep-dive report.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Metric:** A recent drop from 15 to 0 was caused by a Scrunch calculation change, not a performance issue.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX's new prompt-monitoring tool launches Feb 2–7, enabling self-service prompt editing and more accurate tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Provide a formal security policy on data separation from competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Add Marcus to Airtable and Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)
      - [Demo the new prompt-monitoring tool next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2336.0)
      - [Analyze existing white papers and propose blog post topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [**You.com:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
      - [Share updated goals and OKRs with GrowthX by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
      - [Update and share the target keyword list.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
      - [Continue processing the content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/Xep2yrC_afLn1i5xgNgqagk9_oU8Vu8A?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
